lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭਾਗਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa bhram bhau bhaagaa har har har gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: His comings and goings, doubts and fears come to an end, and he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਉਤਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh dukh utare har har naam samaaeaa |
lines.english: The sins and pains of countless incarnations are washed away, and he merges into the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਭਾਗ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਫਲੁ ਜਨਮੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin har dhiaaeaa dhur bhaag likh paaeaa tin safal janam paravaan jeeo |
lines.english: Those who are blessed by such pre-ordained destiny, meditate on the Lord, and their lives become fruitful and approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਦੁ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har har man bhaaeaa param sukh paaeaa har laahaa pad nirabaan jeeo |3|
lines.english: One whose mind loves the Lord, Har, Har, obtains supreme peace. He reaps the profit of the Lord's Name, the state of Nirvaanaa. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨਾ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਪਰਧਾਨਾ ਤੇ ਊਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲੋਗ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jina har meetth lagaanaa te jan paradhaanaa te aootam har har log jeeo |
lines.english: Celebrated are those people, unto whom the Lord seems sweet; how exalted are those people of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har naam vaddaaee har naam sakhaaee gurasabadee har ras bhog jeeo |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is their glorious greatness; the Lord's Name is their companion and helper. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they enjoy the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਮਹਾ ਨਿਰਜੋਗ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har ras bhog mahaa nirajog vaddabhaagee har ras paaeaa |
lines.english: They enjoy the sublime essence of the Lord, and remain totally detached. By great good fortune, they obtain the sublime essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਧੰਨੁ ਵਡੇ ਸਤ ਪੁਰਖਾ ਪੂਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: se dhan vadde sat purakhaa poore jin guramat naam dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: So very blessed and truly perfect are those, who through Guru's Instruction meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨਾ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਪਰਧਾਨਾ ਤੇ ਊਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲੋਗ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jina har meetth lagaanaa te jan paradhaanaa te aootam har har log jeeo |4|3|10|
lines.english: Celebrated are those people, unto whom the Lord seems sweet; how exalted are those people of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||3||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਰੇਣੁ ਮੰਗੈ ਪਗ ਸਾਧੂ ਮਨਿ ਚੂਕਾ ਸੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ren mangai pag saadhoo man chookaa sog vijog jeeo |
lines.english: Servant Nanak begs for the dust of the feet of the Holy; his mind is rid of sorrow and separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਸਰੀਰਾ ਪਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਧਰਮੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: satajug sabh santokh sareeraa pag chaare dharam dhiaan jeeo |
lines.english: In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, everyone embodied contentment and meditation; religion stood upon four feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: man tan har gaaveh param sukh paaveh har hiradai har gun giaan jeeo |
lines.english: With mind and body, they sang of the Lord, and attained supreme peace. In their hearts was the spiritual wisdom of the Lord's Glorious Virtues.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਤਾਰਥੁ ਸੋਭਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gun giaan padaarath har har kirataarath sobhaa guramukh hoee |
lines.english: Their wealth was the spiritual wisdom of the Lord's Glorious Virtues; the Lord was their success, and to live as Gurmukh was their glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵੈ ਮਾਨੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har liv laaee har naam sakhaaee har daragah paavai maan jeeo |
lines.english: They centered their consciousness lovingly on the Lord, Har, Har. The Lord's Name was their companion, and in the Court of the Lord, they obtained honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੋ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar baahar har prabh eko doojaa avar na koee |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, they saw only the One Lord God; for them there was no other second.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਤਾ ਜੁਗੁ ਆਇਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਤੁ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: tetaa jug aaeaa antar jor paaeaa jat sanjam karam kamaae jeeo |
lines.english: Then came the Silver Age of Trayta Yuga; men's minds were ruled by power, and they practiced celibacy and self-discipline.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਜੁਗਿ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਸਰੀਰਾ ਪਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਧਰਮੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satajug sabh santokh sareeraa pag chaare dharam dhiaan jeeo |1|
lines.english: In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, everyone embodied contentment and meditation; religion stood upon four feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਗੁ ਚਉਥਾ ਖਿਸਿਆ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਪਗ ਟਿਕਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਜਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: pag chauthaa khisiaa trai pag ttikiaa man hiradai krodh jalaae jeeo |
lines.english: The fourth foot of religion dropped off, and three remained. Their hearts and minds were inflamed with anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਮਹਾ ਬਿਸਲੋਧੁ ਨਿਰਪ ਧਾਵਹਿ ਲੜਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man hiradai krodh mahaa bisalodh nirap dhaaveh larr dukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Their hearts and minds were filled with the horribly poisonous essence of anger. The kings fought their wars and obtained only pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਮਤਾ ਰੋਗੁ ਲਗਾਨਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਵਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar mamataa rog lagaanaa haumai ahankaar vadhaaeaa |
lines.english: Their minds were afflicted with the illness of egotism, and their self-conceit and arrogance increased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਮੇਰੈ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har kripaa dhaaree merai tthaakur bikh guramat har naam leh jaae jeeo |
lines.english: If my Lord, Har, Har, shows His Mercy, my Lord and Master eradicates the poison by the Guru's Teachings and the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਦੁਆਪੁਰੁ ਆਇਆ ਭਰਮਿ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਪੀ ਕਾਨੑੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jug duaapur aaeaa bharam bharamaaeaa har gopee kaanau upaae jeeo |
lines.english: The Brass Age of Dwaapar Yuga came, and people wandered in doubt. The Lord created the Gopis and Krishna.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਤਾ ਜੁਗੁ ਆਇਆ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਤੁ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tetaa jug aaeaa antar jor paaeaa jat sanjam karam kamaae jeeo |2|
lines.english: Then came the Silver Age of Trayta Yuga; men's minds were ruled by power, and they practiced celibacy and self-discipline. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਪੁ ਤਾਪਨ ਤਾਪਹਿ ਜਗ ਪੁੰਨ ਆਰੰਭਹਿ ਅਤਿ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: tap taapan taapeh jag pun aaranbheh at kiriaa karam kamaae jeeo |
lines.english: The penitents practiced penance, they offered sacred feasts and charity, and performed many rituals and religious rites.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਰਿਆ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਪਗ ਦੁਇ ਖਿਸਕਾਇਆ ਦੁਇ ਪਗ ਟਿਕੈ ਟਿਕਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kiriaa karam kamaaeaa pag due khisakaaeaa due pag ttikai ttikaae jeeo |
lines.english: They performed many rituals and religious rites; two legs of religion dropped away, and only two legs remained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਜੁਧ ਜੋਧ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਨੑੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਪਚੈ ਪਚਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa judh jodh bahu keenae vich haumai pachai pachaae jeeo |
lines.english: So many heroes waged great wars; in their egos they were ruined, and they ruined others as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਧੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਲੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal gur saadh milaaeaa mil satigur mal leh jaae jeeo |
lines.english: The Lord, Compassionate to the poor, led them to meet the Holy Guru. Meeting the True Guru, their filth is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗੁ ਦੁਆਪੁਰੁ ਆਇਆ ਭਰਮਿ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਪੀ ਕਾਨੑੁ ਉਪਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jug duaapur aaeaa bharam bharamaaeaa har gopee kaanau upaae jeeo |3|
lines.english: The Brass Age of Dwaapar Yuga came, and the people wandered in doubt. The Lord created the Gopis and Krishna. ||3||
